skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Damage dealt to Shield ▲ 601.01% continuously.
skill1.note: No shield-damage StatKey in types.ts; scope-lock partless boss never shields — inert in all graded scenarios.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when recovery takes effect. Affects self. ATK ▲ 96.98% for 25 sec.
skill1.note: Re-encoded from passive proxy to kit-faithful recovery trigger. Uptime depends on healer presence or own burst lifesteal (see caveats).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects self when in Shield status. Elemental Advantage Attack Damage ▲ 30.02% for 10 sec.
skill2.note: Shield-status gate NOT modeled (no engine support); fires unconditionally at FB entry. Over-credits shielder-less teams; only relevant with elemental advantage.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all Fire Code allies. Damage dealt when attacking core ▲ 60.07% for 10 sec.
skill2.note: Includes self (she is Fire). Faithful encoding.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Gain Pierce for 25 sec.
burst.note: Approximated as permanent (real duration 25s). Pierce is inert in v1 (PIERCE_CORE_DOUBLE off, pierceDamagePct unbuffed, partless boss).

burst.kitLine: Recovers 3.16% of attack damage as HP over 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0] effects[1] — kind:heal (single event at cast)
burst.note: Approximated as one recovery event at cast vs real 10s HoT. Fires her own S1 recovery trigger (self-sustaining ATK buff). Verify self-lifesteal procs 'when recovery takes effect'.
Inert in current engine (no hit-rate mechanic). Modeled for future-proofing.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: ATK ▲96.98% is recovery-triggered — needs a heal landing on her (teammate healer, or her own burst lifesteal); a healer-less team that never Full-Bursts gains it never
documentedConfounds.why: If the sim assumes uptime that doesn't materialize in a healer-less comp, ATK buff never fires → under-models. Conversely if sim always credits it, HOT in healer-less.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Elemental Advantage buff requires Shield status in-game — no shield-state gate in the engine, modeled as unconditional at Full-Burst entry
documentedConfounds.why: Over-credits 30% elemAdvantage damage in shielder-less teams vs elemental-advantage bosses. Only matters when elemental advantage is active.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: 'Gain Pierce for 25 sec' modeled as permanent hasPierce (pierce currently inert vs the v1 boss); lifesteal modeled as one recovery event at cast, real effect ticks over 10s
documentedConfounds.why: Pierce inert in v1 so no damage impact. Lifesteal timing affects S1 recovery trigger cadence — single event at cast is earlier than distributed ticks but net recovery count per burst is the same (1 proc).

documentedConfounds.text: burst: fire cadence is an unmeasured datamine estimate — 20-ammo AR with an 18.76% normal multiplier is unlikely to fire at the AR class default
documentedConfounds.why: If real fire-rate is slower than datamine suggests (collab positron rifle), sim over-counts normal hits → HOT. This is flagged as the biggest unverified lever.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number.
documentedConfounds.why: Global disclaimer — unit has never been fielded or measured. All values are datamine-parse hypotheses.

authorIntentSummary: The override is a parser-baseline hypothesis (wave 5, 2026-07-16) encoding Asuka's full kit faithfully except: shield-damage (inert, unmodeled), shield-status gate on S2 (no engine support, unconditional), pierce duration (permanent approx, inert), and lifesteal timing (single event vs HoT). The S1 ATK buff was deliberately re-encoded from a passive proxy to a kit-faithful recovery trigger, making healer presence a hard uptime dependency. The author flags fire cadence (20-ammo AR, 18.76% normalMult) as the biggest unverified lever and the unit has zero board data — it has never been measured against a real fight.
